mapper.select: SELECT wm.id AS id, wm.workspace_id AS workspaceId, wm.user_id AS userId, wm.role AS role, u.email AS email, u.full_name AS fullName, wm.joined_at AS createdAt FROM workspace_members wm INNER JOIN users u ON wm.user_id = u.id WHERE wm.workspace_id = #{workspaceId}::uuid ORDER BY wm.joined_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workspace_members (id, workspace_id, user_id, role, joined_at) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{workspaceId}::uuid, #{userId}::uuid, #{role}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workspace_members WHERE workspace_id = #{workspaceId}::uuid AND user_id = #{userId}::uuid
